theory: Spatial-LT needs dataset-aware metadata and valid counterfactual instructions.
method: Manifest-driven task counts and negatives; OXE registration for libero_spatial_lt.
reflection: Infrastructure is valid; screening can proceed.

theory: Full-run TCAD/reweighting may over-correct relation-only splits.
experiment: Most variants underperform or tie baseline in 10-trial screening.
reflection: Useful signal exists but stability-plasticity is the bottleneck.

theory: Replay may solve frequency imbalance without changing objective.
method: Full-balanced and tempered task replay TFDS builders.
reflection: Repeating low-diversity tail demos damages spatial adaptation; replay branch closed.

theory: BARC gains may come from relation counterfactual correction alone.
reflection: TCAD alone is insufficient; correction direction is useful only with controlled fusion.

theory: Useful relation delta should be localized away from projector drift.
method: RSDF module-localized checkpoint fusion from baseline and BARC.
experiment: vision+LLM reaches 0.31 on 10-trial, best screening result.

theory: RSDF should preserve baseline embodied policy while transferring relation grounding.
method: Matched 30-trial eval: baseline-1000 vs RSDF vision+LLM alpha=0.5.
reflection: Goal met for Spatial-LT screening; paper claim must remain bounded by single-seed/additional-dataset limitations.
